name: Bubble Tower
author: Poki
description: Bubble Tower is a fresh twist on the classic bubble shooter where you aim, shoot, and pop colorful bubbles wrapped around a 3D tower! Rotate the cylinder to line up the perfect shot, match 3 or more bubbles to clear them, and stop the tower from filling up. With simple controls, relaxing visuals, and addictive gameplay, every level is a fun challenge that’s easy to pick up but hard to master. Ready to spin, aim, and clear the tower? How to play Bubble Tower? Click to shoot the bubbles. Who created Bubble Tower? Bubble Tower is created by Being Gaming. Play their other games on Poki: Merge And Decor ! How can I play Bubble Tower for free? You can play Bubble Tower for free on Poki. Can I play Bubble Tower on mobile devices and desktop? Bubble Tower can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
